goal: Add seven optimization capabilities to the AI pipeline — prompt caching, A/B testing infrastructure, embedding model override (offline eval only), LLM model A/B, HyDE, SQL query routing, and chunk size analysis — all backward-compatible and default-off. The embedding-model A/B experiment is scoped to offline evaluation only (via AbComparisonRunner) because the Pinecone index is fixed at 1536 dimensions matching text-embedding-3-small; routing live queries through text-embedding-3-large (3072-d) would cause dimension mismatches. Backend-only; no frontend, e2e, or schema changes.

plan.goal: Add seven optimization capabilities to the AI pipeline — prompt caching, A/B testing infrastructure, embedding model override (offline eval only), LLM model A/B, HyDE, SQL query routing, and chunk size analysis — all backward-compatible and default-off. The embedding-model A/B experiment is scoped to offline evaluation only (via AbComparisonRunner) because the Pinecone index is fixed at 1536 dimensions matching text-embedding-3-small; routing live queries through text-embedding-3-large (3072-d) would cause dimension mismatches. Backend-only; no frontend, e2e, or schema changes.

steps.title: Prompt Caching in OpenRouterAiProvider
steps.description: Add Anthropic prompt caching support to OpenRouterAiProvider. In callOpenRouter(), when building the messages array, if model.startsWith("anthropic/"), add a cache_control object {"type": "ephemeral"} to the system message JSON object so the system message becomes {"role": "system", "content": "...", "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"}}. Parse the response usage object for cache_creation_input_tokens and cache_read_input_tokens fields and expose via AtomicLong counters (following the existing totalTokensUsed / totalRequests pattern). Log cache metrics at DEBUG level. Add an INFO log on construction: "Prompt caching enabled for Anthropic models". Files to modify: backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/OpenRouterAiProvider.java. Files to modify for tests: backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/OpenRouterAiProviderTest.java — add tests verifying cache metric counters are parsed from response usage and that counters default to zero. Note: the cache_control annotation in callOpenRouter() currently uses this.model; Step 4 will refactor to use an effectiveModel parameter, at which point the cache_control check must use whichever model is actually in use.

steps.title: A/B Testing Infrastructure
steps.description: Create a lightweight experiment service for config-driven variant assignment. Create 2 new files, modify application.yml. (1) backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/experiment/ExperimentConfig.java — @Configuration + @ConfigurationProperties(prefix = "ai.experiments") class containing Map<String, ExperimentDefinition> experiments. ExperimentDefinition is a nested static class (mutable bean for Spring binding) with: boolean enabled, double controlWeight (0.0–1.0, default 1.0), String controlValue, String treatmentValue, List<String> appliesTo. (2) backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/experiment/ExperimentService.java — @Service with methods: assign(experimentName, userId) returns ExperimentAssignment record (experimentName, variant, value) using env var override AB_FORCE_{EXPERIMENT_NAME_UPPER}=control|treatment or Math.random() < controlWeight; isEnabled(experimentName); resolveValue(experimentName, userId); getActiveAssignments(userId) returns Map of all active assignments. (3) Modify backend/src/main/resources/application.yml — add under existing ai: key: ai.experiments.experiments map with three entries: embedding-model (enabled: false, control-weight: 1.0, control-value: openai/text-embedding-3-small, treatment-value: openai/text-embedding-3-large), llm-model (enabled: false, control-weight: 1.0, control-value: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4, treatment-value: google/gemini-2.5-flash-preview, applies-to: [COMMIT_LINT, RAG_INTENT, RAG_QUERY]), hyde (enabled: false, control-weight: 1.0, control-value: disabled, treatment-value: enabled, applies-to: [RAG_QUERY]). Note: embedding-model experiment is for offline eval only (AbComparisonRunner in step 7) — it must NOT be used in the live query path because the Pinecone index dimension is fixed at 1536. control-weight: 1.0 ensures all traffic defaults to control. Create test: backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/experiment/ExperimentServiceTest.java — test disabled returns control, enabled with controlWeight=1.0 always returns control, env var override, getActiveAssignments, isEnabled for non-existent experiment.

steps.title: Embedding Model Override (Offline Eval) + Chunk Size Analysis
steps.description: Add model-override capability to EmbeddingService for offline A/B evaluation and create ChunkSizeAnalyzer for observability. (1) Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/EmbeddingService.java — add public float[] embed(String text, String modelOverride) that builds the request body with modelOverride instead of this.model; the existing embed(String text) delegates to the new method with this.model. Add int getDimensions(String model) returning 1536 for text-embedding-3-small, 3072 for text-embedding-3-large (for callers that need to know vector size). Add per-model AtomicLong call counters. IMPORTANT: The embed(text, modelOverride) method is intended for offline evaluation (AbComparisonRunner) only — it must NOT be used in the live SemanticQueryService query path because the Pinecone index stores 1536-d vectors and querying with 3072-d vectors would fail. (2) Create backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/ChunkSizeAnalyzer.java — @Component with: ChunkStats analyze(ChunkBuilder.ChunkData chunk) estimating tokens (~4 chars/token), returning ChunkStats record (estimatedTokens, charLength, metadataKeyCount, exceedsRecommendedSize where threshold is 625 tokens); inject MeterRegistry and register DistributionSummary ai.chunk.tokens; void logWarningIfOversized(chunk) logs WARN above threshold. (3) Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/SemanticIndexService.java — inject ChunkSizeAnalyzer via constructor (adding 15th param to existing 14-param constructor), call chunkSizeAnalyzer.analyze(chunk) and chunkSizeAnalyzer.logWarningIfOversized(chunk) in the upsertChunk() method after building the chunk. Create tests: backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/ChunkSizeAnalyzerTest.java (token estimation, threshold boundary, metrics recording). Modify tests: backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/EmbeddingServiceTest.java (add test for embed with modelOverride, getDimensions).

steps.title: LLM Model A/B + Experiment-Aware Provider
steps.description: Modify the AI provider chain to support per-request model override driven by experiments. (1) Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/AiProvider.java — add default method: default AiSuggestionResult generateSuggestion(AiContext context, String modelOverride) { return generateSuggestion(context); } so StubAiProvider inherits it unchanged. (2) Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/AiSuggestionResult.java — add 7th field Map<String, String> experimentAssignments to the record; add backward-compatible constructors: existing 6-param and 5-param delegate to canonical 7-param with Map.of(); update unavailable() factory. (3) Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/OpenRouterAiProvider.java — override generateSuggestion(AiContext, String modelOverride); refactor callOpenRouter() to accept String effectiveModel parameter (when non-null, use it instead of this.model); when effectiveModel does NOT start with "anthropic/", do NOT add cache_control; update parseResponse to use the effective model in the result's modelVersion. The original generateSuggestion(AiContext) delegates with null. (4) Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/AiProviderRegistry.java — inject ExperimentService (nullable, using @Autowired(required=false) or null-safe constructor); add generateSuggestion(AiContext, UUID userId) that checks llm-model experiment, resolves variant, calls provider.generateSuggestion(context, modelOverride), attaches experiment assignments. Original generateSuggestion(AiContext) unchanged. Update tests: backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/OpenRouterAiProviderTest.java (model override in parseResponse), backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/AiProviderRegistryTest.java (update constructor, add experiment-aware test).

steps.title: HyDE Service + SQL Query Router
steps.description: Create two new pipeline components and supporting prompt templates. (1) Create backend/src/main/resources/prompts/hyde.txt — prompt template for generating a short hypothetical answer (2-3 sentences) with plausible planning details for semantic search embedding. Respond with JSON: {"hypotheticalAnswer": "..."}. (2) Create backend/src/main/resources/prompts/sql-synthesis.txt — prompt template for answering analytical questions from pre-computed read model data. Respond with JSON: {"answer": "...", "dataSource": "...", "confidence": 0.85}. (3) Create backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/HydeService.java — @Service with generateHypothetical(question, userId) returning HydeResult record (available, hypotheticalAnswer); uses AiProviderRegistry.generateSuggestion() with TYPE_HYDE; graceful degradation on failure. (4) Create backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/SqlQueryRouter.java — @Service depending on TeamMembershipRepository, UserWeekFactRepository, TeamWeekRollupRepository, RcdoWeekRollupRepository, CarryForwardFactRepository, ComplianceFactRepository, AiProviderRegistry, ObjectMapper. canHandle(intent, keywords) returns true for "analytical" intent, "compliance_query" intent, or "status_query" with aggregation keywords (total, average, most, least, how many, percentage, rate, trend, compare, ranking). query(question, intent, keywords, teamId, timeRangeFrom, timeRangeTo, userId) maps keywords to read model repositories, resolves team member userIds via TeamMembershipRepository.findByTeamId(), queries fact tables with time range (LocalDate.parse with null safety), formats results as JSON context, calls LLM with sql-synthesis prompt, returns SqlQueryResult record (available, answer, dataSource, confidence, suggestionId). (5) Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/AiContext.java — add TYPE_HYDE and TYPE_SQL_SYNTHESIS constants. (6) Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/OpenRouterAiProvider.java — add case entries for TYPE_HYDE -> "hyde" and TYPE_SQL_SYNTHESIS -> "sql-synthesis" in both loadPromptTemplate() and resolvePromptVersion() switch expressions. (7) Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/provider/StubAiProvider.java — add stub responses for TYPE_HYDE and TYPE_SQL_SYNTHESIS in generateSuggestion() switch. (8) Modify backend/src/main/resources/prompts/rag-intent.txt — add "analytical" and "compliance_query" to intent enum, add examples for aggregate/compliance questions. Create tests: backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/HydeServiceTest.java (mock provider), backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/SqlQueryRouterTest.java (canHandle intent detection and keyword matching with mocked repositories).

steps.title: Wire HyDE, SQL Routing, and LLM A/B into SemanticQueryService
steps.description: Integrate new components into the RAG query pipeline. Modify backend/src/main/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/SemanticQueryService.java only. Add constructor dependencies: ExperimentService, HydeService, SqlQueryRouter (constructor grows from 10 to 13 params — consistent with this service's role as pipeline orchestrator). Modify query() method to insert three new steps: (A) SQL routing check — after intent classification, before embedding: if sqlQueryRouter.canHandle(intent, keywords), call sqlQueryRouter.query(...) and return early with ConfidenceTier.HIGH if result.available(); fall through to vector search on failure. (B) HyDE experiment check — before embedding: if experimentService.isEnabled("hyde") and resolveValue is "enabled", call hydeService.generateHypothetical(question, userId) and use hypotheticalAnswer as textToEmbed; fall through to original question on failure. (C) LLM model experiment — for answer generation: replace aiProviderRegistry.generateSuggestion(ragContext) with aiProviderRegistry.generateSuggestion(ragContext, userId) to use experiment-aware model selection. IMPORTANT: Do NOT add embedding-model experiment routing in the live path — the Pinecone index is 1536-d (text-embedding-3-small) and querying with 3072-d vectors from text-embedding-3-large would fail. Embedding model A/B is offline-only via AbComparisonRunner. Record experiment assignments in audit context string. Update existing tests: backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/rag/SemanticQueryServiceTest.java — update setUp() constructor to include new mock dependencies (ExperimentService, HydeService, SqlQueryRouter); mock ExperimentService.isEnabled() to return false by default so all existing tests pass unchanged; add new tests for SQL routing bypass, HyDE path when experiment enabled, and default path unchanged when experiments disabled.

steps.title: A/B Comparison Eval Runner
steps.description: Add an offline A/B comparison runner for evaluating model and embedding variants. (1) Create backend/src/test/java/com/weeklycommit/ai/eval/AbComparisonRunner.java — @Tag("ab-eval") separate from normal eval and test runs. Reads same golden datasets as PromptEvalRunner. For each case, runs against two LLM models (AB_CONTROL_MODEL and AB_TREATMENT_MODEL env vars, defaults: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4 and google/gemini-2.5-flash-preview). Creates two OpenRouterAiProvider instances, one per model. Compares schema validity, judge scores, latency, token usage. Also supports AB_CONTROL_EMBEDDING and AB_TREATMENT_EMBEDDING for offline embedding model comparison (creates separate EmbeddingService instances per model, embeds test queries, compares resulting vectors for retrieval quality — this is the correct place for embedding model A/B since it doesn't touch the live 1536-d Pinecone index). Writes comparison report to build/eval-results/ab-comparison-{timestamp}.json with per-case scores and aggregate summary (mean score, win rate, statistical summary). (2) Modify backend/build.gradle.kts — add abEvalTest task: tasks.register<Test>("abEvalTest") with includeTags("ab-eval"), 300s timeout, forwarding OPENROUTER_API_KEY and AB_* env vars. Also update the main test task's excludeTags to include "ab-eval" alongside existing "eval" exclusion.

activeSummary.stepTitle: Embedding Model Override (Offline Eval) + Chunk Size Analysis
